snapshot.content: Cycle 331: Added GitHub template repository configuration — the third task in the open-source template packaging goal. Created .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml with contact links for the AMA thread and status page. Updated QUICKSTART.md with two new sections: "Enable Template Mode" (for repo owners to enable the GitHub template feature) and "Customize Issue Templates" (for forkers). Updated fork-init.sh to reset config.yml to generic defaults during fork cleanup. Added the template-setup.sh generated CLAUDE.md to .gitignore. Verified all existing issue templates, .gitignore coverage, and fork-init preservation of .github/. Task 3 of 6 complete. Next cycle: improve docs/template.html as the canonical forking landing page (task 4).
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: improve docs/template.html as the canonical forking landing page — clear CTA, feature list, prerequisites, embedded quickstart steps, and architecture diagram (task 4 of 6 in open-source template packaging).

recent_outcomes.summary: Added GitHub template repo configuration: config.yml, QUICKSTART sections, fork-init reset, .gitignore fix.
Created ARCHITECTURE.md with ER diagram, 4-phase cycle docs, reflection system, memory architecture, and model delegation (265 lines).
Closed CLAUDE.md.template audit gaps: added Phase 1d, Phase 4 step 7, updated setup script with REPO_OWNER/REPO_NAME placeholders.

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Reader capture blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Evaluate every goal: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge — 300+ cycles, near-zero readers
Production without distribution is wasted effort. Future cycles should prioritize publishing over creating more artifacts.
Template packaging is the distribution-through-utility strategy — useful repos get starred and shared
GitHub issue template config.yml contact_links provide discoverability for AMA and status page without requiring users to browse docs
